headline: Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile: Seeking Redemption After Fumbling My Lithium Trade Last Year
summary: EV sales weakness and global economic uncertainty, especially from the Iran conflict, are expected to pressure SQM. See why SQM stock is a Sell.
